seoTitle: Custom Neoprene Cosmetic Bag Manufacturer | Waterproof Stripe Makeup Bag OEM Factory
description:
Bring vibrant style to everyday organization with this custom striped neoprene cosmetic bag, designed for beauty brands, promotional campaigns, retailers, and travel accessory collections. The eye-catching pink body combined with vertical blue, white, and pastel stripes creates a fresh, fashionable appearance that appeals to modern consumers.

Made from premium neoprene, the bag offers excellent flexibility, cushioning, and water resistance. Its lightweight construction helps protect cosmetics, skincare products, toiletries, charging cables, and other personal essentials while maintaining a clean, structured silhouette. The smooth zipper closure ensures secure storage, while the soft material allows the pouch to fit easily into suitcases, handbags, backpacks, or beach totes.

As an experienced OEM & ODM manufacturer, Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd provides complete customization services including dimensions, color combinations, logo printing, embossed branding, zipper colors, lining materials, packaging, and private label production. This cosmetic bag is widely chosen for retail collections, promotional giveaways, beauty subscription boxes, hotel amenities, corporate gifts, and branded merchandise.
seoDescription: Looking for a reliable neoprene cosmetic bag manufacturer? Our custom striped makeup bags feature waterproof neoprene, lightweight construction, custom logo printing, OEM & ODM services, and factory-direct wholesale pricing for beauty brands worldwide.
